headline: Assessing Prologis (PLD) Valuation After A Strong 1 Year Total Shareholder Return
summary: Prologis stock in focus Prologis (PLD) is drawing investor attention after recent trading left the stock at a last close of US$142. The real estate investment trust structure and global logistics footprint remain central to how investors assess its earnings power. See our latest analysis for Prologis. While the share price has eased 1.2% over the last day, it is still up 10.0% year to date, and the 1 year total shareholder return of 36.6% points to stronger recent momentum. If you are...
